name: Baghdad Central
overview: Shortly after the fall of Saddam Hussein, Iraqi ex-policeman Muhsin al-Khafaji has lost everything and is battling daily to keep himself and his sick daughter, Mrouj safe. But when he learns that his estranged elder daughter Sawsan is missing Khafaji is forced into a desperate search to find her.

trailers.title: TRAILER | New Drama | Baghdad Central | Coming Soon to Channel 4 & All 4
